title: Dexter Phase 2.5 — Hardening Pass Design Spec
summary: Reliability hardening design for the Dexter Discord bot: unsilence swallowed exceptions, fix deterministic bugs, and plug resource leaks verifiable from local boot.
scope: cogs/music.py bare-except unsilencing and playlist error followup
bot.py first-run Gemini-key guard and yt-dlp daily update loop
notes: Path under /specs/ plus implementation-contract content (modified-files map, line-referenced fixes, testing approach) = strong SPEC. A 'Decisions Made' table competes for ADR, but these are scoped engineering choices within a hardening pass rather than a single locked Context/Decision/Consequences record; resolved to SPEC per ambiguity rule favoring the dominant implementation-design signal.
